steps.title: Identify the percentage ratio
steps.content:
The jumbo binder clips are the part, and all binder clips are the whole:
$$\frac{308{,}000}{400{,}000}$$

steps.title: Convert to a percent
steps.content:
Simplify the fraction and multiply by $100\%$:
$$\frac{308{,}000}{400{,}000}=\frac{308}{400}=\frac{77}{100}=77\%$$
The answer is D.
